name: COSCO SHIPPING Ports Limited
summary: COSCO SHIPPING Ports Limited, an investment holding company, manages and operates terminals and related businesses in Mainland China, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Europe, South America, the Mediterranean, and internationally. The company operates container, container freight stations, terminals, container terminals, and rail terminals, as well as offers financing, treasury, management, logistics, and consultancy services. As of December 31, 2020, it operated and managed 357 berths at 36 ports with a total annual handling capacity of approximately 118 million TEU. The company was formerly known as COSCO Pacific Limited and changed its name to COSCO SHIPPING Ports Limited in July 2016. COSCO SHIPPING Ports Limited was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
